name: alderpost-mcp
description: 8 bundled intelligence endpoints — domain security, company intel, threat analysis, compliance, sales intelligence, sports, property, and health data. Pay per call via x402 USDC on Base.

tools.name: domain_shield
tools.description: Domain security scan: SPF, DKIM, DMARC, SSL, MX, DNSSEC. 7 checks scored 0-100. $0.25/call.

tools.name: company_xray
tools.description: Company intelligence: tech stack, infrastructure, social presence, business signals. 8 sources scored 0-100. $0.50/call.

tools.name: threat_pulse
tools.description: Threat intelligence: blacklists, open ports, SSL, email security. Scored 0-100. $0.35/call.

tools.name: compliance_check
tools.description: IT compliance audit: email auth, headers, cookies, privacy, DNSSEC. Letter graded. $0.85/call.

tools.name: prospect_iq
tools.description: Sales intelligence: web presence, tech stack, social signals, contact readiness. Scored 0-100. $0.40/call.

tools.name: sports_edge
tools.description: Pre-game sports intelligence: standings, odds, AI analysis. $0.50/call.

tools.name: property_intel
tools.description: Location intelligence: amenities, schools, elevation, walkability. Scored 0-100. $0.75/call.

tools.name: health_signal
tools.description: Health intelligence: FDA drug info, adverse events, recalls, nutrition. Risk scored. $0.30/call.
